title: Marco Costalba
text: Home * People * Marco Costalba Marco Costalba , an Italian software developer and proponent of open source software [1] . Marco is author of QGit [2] , a GUI of the free distributed version control system Git [3] , initially designed and developed by Linus Torvalds for Linux kernel development. Contents 1 Stockfish 2 Forum Posts 2.1 2008 ... 2.2 2010 ... 2.3 2015 ... 3 External Links 4 References Stockfish [ edit ] Based on Tord Romstad's open source chess program Glaurung under the GNU General Public License , he started a branch called Stockfish in 2008 [4] , which in the meantime has become the main branch of Glaurung, further supported by Tord Romstad and Joona Kiiski as development team [5] .
